case_title: EMC MORTGAGE CORP. vs. FISHER, LLOYD

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $113.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF EMC MORTGAGE CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT FISHER, LLOYD
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FISHER, LLOYD
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT FISHER, LLOYD
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EMC MORTGAGE CORP. SERVED NOV-30-1994, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FISHER, LLOYD
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $12.83 FILED BY PLAINTIFF EMC MORTGAGE CORP.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EMC MORTGAGE CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT FISHER, LLOYD SUMMONS ISSUED
POS OF PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF EMC MORTGAGE CORP.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EMC MORTGAGE CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FISHER, LLOYD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2470 27TH AVE, LEASE FORFEITED, INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES. CCP 415.46.
